intro: Starring Compile’s own Randar-kun! A traditional RPG that’s simple to play but packs a real punch!
description:
This title is a role-playing game originally included in "Disc Station Spring Issue," released by Compile in 1989. Players take on the role of Lander, a young knight of Gameland, and set off on an adventure to save the Kingdom of Mamorus from the clutches of the demon Nestyurba.

The game features an intuitive system where players traverse 2D maps and engage in battles via random encounters. Your adventure will unfold across three towns, three caves, and a castle.

Reflecting the gaming standards of its time, the game requires players to grind for experience and features a high encounter rate, making for a formidable challenge. Its popularity is undeniable, evidenced by the release of sequels like Lander 2 and 3. Don't miss this chance to experience a hit RPG from Compile's early days!
 
 *This application does not have a scene select mode.
 *The main game and gallery screen (*Gallery) are in Japanese version.
 *Other menu screens and "How to play" screens are in English.
